Powdersnow & Inki — Jun 14, 2026 All-Class Final Tier List

English translation of a joint KR Lost Ark all-class final tier list by Powdersnow (Kazeros 3rd clear) and GamingInki (게임하는인기), covering every class × both Ark Passive enlightenments — 29 classes × 2 builds = 58 entries, including supports.
Built live as a 10-hour offline collab on Inki’s channel — Chzzk VOD #13692294 (“로스트아크 전직업 토크 인기x눈가루 오프라인 합방”, recorded 2026-06-13). Powdersnow posted the completed tier list to the Inven free board as post #3760249 at 00:26 KST on 2026-06-14, with the note that within a tier the icon order doesn’t carry strength ranking.
KR class / build names verified against Loawa rankings. Build icons taken from the in-game Ark Passive enlightenment art.
Twitch · Discord · YouTube · More tools & translations →

Source image

Captured mid-stream by Powdersnow (1577×863). Click for full resolution.

Tier breakdown (translated) — with in-game build icons

Each DPS chip shows two deltas vs. the raid-wide mean: a uDPSu delta (personal CP-normalized damage) and an italic rDPSr delta (raid DPS including the party-buff contribution the build provides). The five hybrid DPS builds (Shining Knight, Judgment, True Courage, Recurrence, Combat Readiness) typically show a much larger rDPS than uDPS because their kit also juices the party.
Pure supports (Liberator, Blessed Aura, Desperate Salvation, Full Bloom) and Princess Gunlancer are excluded from both baselines entirely and carry no delta chip — they don’t compete with DPS specs on either metric, so mixing them in would distort the means. Source: lostark.bible (DPS-per-CP search), averaged across Serca G1/G2 (Nightmare) and Kazeros G1/G2 (Hard).

Author’s notes from the Inven post: “Within the same tier the icon order does not reflect a strength ranking. ‘DPS Holy Knight Judgment’ (딜홀나) was excluded because they don’t have a strong tier opinion on it. The two of us talked for 10 hours straight to put this together — see the VOD or the YouTube cut for the reasoning.”

Translation notes

Three quirks of the OP’s shorthand

“스카” is ambiguous. The standard KR slang is 스카 = 스카우터 = Machinist. This OP also uses it as a contraction of 스트라이커 (Striker) — you can see 스카-유산 (Machinist Evolutionary Legacy in S) and 스카-일격 (Striker Deathblow in A) and 스카-난무 (Striker Esoteric Flurry in B) all sharing the same prefix. Match by build to disambiguate.

“블래” is ambiguous. Standard usage is 블래 = 블래스터 = Artillerist. This OP also wrote 블래 for Deathblade (block-icons 블래-버스트 in B = Deathblade Surge). The canonical Deathblade abbrev is 블레, not 블래; treat it as an OP typo and trust the build name (버스트 = Deathblade Surge; 포격/화력 = Artillerist).

“환수사-아성” is almost certainly “환수사-야성”. 야성 (“Ferality”) is one of Wildsoul’s two Ark Passive enlightenments; 아성 (“citadel”) doesn’t map to any build in the Loawa taxonomy. The icon in the tile is the Ferality paw-print emblem, so the row reads as Wildsoul Ferality.

“호크-두동” = Sharpshooter Loyal Companion. Not the more familiar 호크-환각 (also Loyal Companion). 두동 is a contraction of 두 번째 동료 (“Second Companion”, the build’s full KR name).

Pre-Ark-Passive carry-over. “강무” (Deadeye Tactical Bullet) is one of those slangs that stuck from the pre-Ark-Passive era — it abbreviates the old engraving 강화된 무기 (“Enhanced Weapon”) into 강+무. When Ark Passive shipped, the community renamed the build 전술 탄환 (Tactical Bullet), but 강무 is still in active KR use.

Bilingual transcript — full 12-hour collab

The complete Powdersnow & Inki collab in Korean + English. Korean transcribed locally with faster-whisper large-v3 on the 5090 (12.1 hours of audio in 42 min wall, 17.1× realtime, 13,006 segments). English translated by an 8-way parallel Claude sub-agent pass with the canonical KR slang reference loaded into each worker’s context. Click any timestamp to jump to that exact moment in the Chzzk VOD.

Speaker labels not attached. The two of them were physically together (offline collab) and shared a microphone setup, so pyannote’s voiceprint-based diarization couldn’t separate them — both speakers register as one. Rows below are time-grouped (gap ≥ 2 s = new row) rather than speaker-grouped, so longer runs of consecutive dialogue from either speaker land in the same row.

1,672 rows · 13,006 segments · click timestamp to jump in stream

He was dealing with a jeonse rental scam.아 이게 그러니까 인별에서 바뀌는 게 있었잖아 그리고 이제 만나고 카제로스 지나고 그나보니까 좀 바뀌었지. 그래서 첫인상이 중요해. 첫인상이 커뮤여도 그렇고 이렇게 하면 안 돼. 그때 진짜 힘들 때였어. 인기 형이 되게 힘들 때였는데. 그때 형이 전세 사기도 당하고 있었어.
3:21:17He was in legal battles over the jeonse scam for a year. But yeah that's how it was. But back then it was that. Other raids were all wiping too, and our group too — I was the raid leader at the time. It's not like I rebalanced the team on my own whim. You guys swapped members too, right? Back then there wasn't even the term 'swap'. There wasn't 'lightbulb-swap',전세 사기 때문에 법적 공방을 1년 동안 하고 있었어. 근데 이제 뭐 그랬지. 근데 그때 그거야. 다른 공대도 다 터지고 있었고 우리도 내가 그때 공대장이었거든 내 맘대로 공대를 리밸런싱하는 게 아니라 너네 공대도 어쨌든 공대원을 갈았잖아 그때는 간다는 표현이 없었어 전구갈이라는 표현이 없었고
3:21:46kind of, once you start you have to finish together. That was the original rule, because it's a gimmick raid and given enough time you'd clear it eventually. And the whole top-10 concept wasn't that important. But at that point Kamen top-10 had just come out for the first time, who knew it'd be that hard? When we were prepping it was all really skilled, top-tier people but honestly,약간 한 번 가면 무조건 같이 가야 된다 그게 원래는 있었는데 왜냐면 어쨌든 기믹 레이드고 시간이 지나면 결국 다 깼잖아 그리고 막 탑10에 대한 그런 개념도 중요하지 않았고 근데 그때는 이제 다 카멘 탑10이 처음 나왔고 그렇게 어려울 줄 누가 알았겠냐고 근데 이제 준비를 할 때 다 진짜 다 실력 있고 쟁쟁하고 그런 사람들로 했지만 사실

3:22:36Is that the testing-for-swap thing you mentioned? A few tests? Yeah. For Kazeros prep we'd go into the raid together. So we did stuff like running Mordum in berserk state with armor off as practice, aggro management, all kinds of weird stuff.공대원 구간다고 그때 그 말한 거야? 테스트 몇 개 하는 거? 그렇지. 카제 로스 준비할 때는 레이드를 같이 가봤어. 플레이 영상 보고 테스트라기 하긴 좀 그렇고 이 사람이 정말 잘하는 거를 같이 가본 거지. 레이드를. 그래서 우리는 모르둠 같은 거 광폭화 상태로 방어구 다 벗고 연습하기 어글 관리 진짜 별의별 거 다 했어
3:23:00And also LOA multi-tasking is important too. So doing multiplication tables while running Mordum, doing word-chain while running Mordum, that kind of thing. Because briefing practice is really important — briefing. When people focus they stop talking. They don't even say 'save me'. Even when they're about to die — they're gonna die in two ticks — the brain's overloaded so they don't ask for help. We felt that stuff was important, so that's how we did it.그 다음에 이제 이게 로아 대 멀티도 중요하잖아 그래가지고 구구단 하면서 모르둠 하기 이런 거 끝말잇기 하면서 모르둠 하기 이런 거 왜냐면 브리핑하는 연습이 되게 중요하죠 브리핑이 사람들이 집중하다보면 말을 안 해요 살려달라고도 말을 안 해요 죽을 건데 투타에서 죽을 건데 순간 뇌에 싸우니까 도와달라고 말을 안 해. 그런 것들이 중요하다고 느껴서 우린 그렇게 했었지.

3:29:13What makes this conversation work is that LOA isn't an absolute game. On paper, by record. Like for example, if you 1v1, if this guy gets 1% stronger, the gap isn't just 1%, it's 2% difference. Right? So if you have Deathblade and you have another Remaining Energy DPS in the same party, Deathblade's absolute value is good. Trishion is good. But if Remaining Energy slots in right next to it, Deathblade's synergy이게 대화가 되는 게 로아가 절대적인 게임이 아니에요 전분상 기록상 그러니까 예를 들어서 1대1로 대결을 하면 이 사람이 1% 세지면 1%만 차이나는 게 아니라 2%가 차이나. 맞지? 그래서 블레이드가 있고 이렇게 다른 사멸 딜러가 있으면 블레이드의 절대적인 값은 좋아. 트리시온은 좋아. 근데 여기에 사멸이 이렇게 딱 들어가면 블레이드의 시너지를
3:29:43which was originally 6% becomes 9%, right? So it sucks up 3%, right? Then Deathblade itself gets 3% weaker. You agree? This is actually right. Because there's a fixed value. 7:02:55You can set dodge to G and Hwanmun to like H. You can patch your binds, but... Even G alone is rough — having to press H too is brutal. Most users haven't rebinded either. Hahahaha Hurry feed Garu food Everyone, then tomorrow again ask Garu once I'll check too, and if okay we'll do it together again tomorrow We'll do that. Thank you for watching until late at night We'll go in right away. Ah it was so fun. Goodbye.오늘 출연료로 이따가 한번 보자고 하하하하하하하 얼른 가루 밥 먹이고 여러분들 그러면 내일 또 뭐 가루한테 한번 물어보고 저도 한번 확인해보고 괜찮으면은 내일 또 같이 하는걸로 그렇게 하도록 하겠습니다 늦은 밤까지 시청해주셔서 감사드리고 저희는 바로 들어가보도록 하겠습니다 아 너무 재밌었다 구영
12:05:49See you all tomorrow.다들 내일 봐요
